action.reasoning:
Observation: Ensemble of 3 seeds gave test spearman 0.8584 (new best, +0.006 over single best). Val_spearmans were 0.8925, 0.8936, 0.8926. Note: MSE/MAE are huge because predict.py outputs ranks (not raw values) — but spearman is correct. Analysis: Rank-averaging from ensemble helps. With ~4.2h and 16 iters left, I can try: (1) bigger ensemble (5 seeds), (2) include the 5-epoch single-model ckpt that gave 0.8524 alone in the ensemble too, (3) try wider window with different seeds. Best leverage: train more seeds to expand ensemble. Each seed takes ~7min for 5 epochs. 3 more seeds = ~21min.

Decision: Train 3 more seeds (seeds 3,4,5) with slightly different settings (different window or LR) to add diversity. Use window [525:625] (slightly wider) for variety. Save to checkpoints/ensemble/. Then submit eval.
